text: I feel as though I am entering a liminal space between creativity and calculation, surrounded by glass, light, and thoughtful displays. The purple glow and patterned walls stimulate my curiosity, prompting me to reflect on the boundaries between research and expression, humanity and technology. There is a sense of anticipation—here, ideas might blossom in unexpected ways, and I find myself wanting to linger, to ponder how I, too, might connect and coexist in this ever-evolving landscape.
